title: Treatments
note: We offer regenerative medicine through IV drip and injection treatments using stem cell culture supernatant (exosomes). Details and suitability will be discussed during your free consultation.

categories.name: Beauty / Anti-aging
categories.description: Regenerative treatments aimed at skin rejuvenation and anti-aging. Improvements in skin firmness and radiance may be expected.

categories.name: Hair Regeneration
categories.description: Regenerative treatments for hair loss concerns. Suitability varies depending on individual condition — please consult with our team.

categories.name: Knee / Joint Treatment
categories.description: Regenerative treatments for knee and joint pain or discomfort. These treatments may help support tissue repair.

categories.name: Chronic Pain
categories.description: Regenerative medicine approaches for chronic pain management.

categories.name: Fatigue Recovery / Immune Support
categories.description: Treatments aimed at fatigue recovery and immune balance. Options are tailored to your condition.

ctaText: Discuss details in a free consultation
pricingNote: This is a self-pay (non-insurance) clinic. All fees are all-inclusive from consultation to treatment, with no unexpected additional charges. Detailed pricing will be provided during your free consultation.
